from the ROS2 node lifecycle (per-node level).

text.tspan: Approach A: predicate text is extracted at code-generation time
and embedded in the runtime monitor as a Python lambda.
Drift between spec and runtime is detected within one cycle.

g.text: spec → generated code → runtime check → /conformance_report (DiagnosticArray @ 0.2 Hz)
